Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(ShipmentStarting), VAR V(ShipmentEnding), VAR V(CustomerStarting), VAR V(CustomerEnding), VAR V(ShipToStarting), VAR V(ShipToEnding), VAR V(PickupDateStarting), VAR V(PickupDateEnding), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR V(DisplayHeader))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
